product.name: Sprinkle Tweed Pants
product.description: Cream multicoloured-flecked tweed pants with a relaxed baggy silhouette, adjustable elastic waist, braided drawcord, and fringed hems.

audience.seed: A style-forward woman buying for herself who wants one distinctive pair of trousers to make simple casual and social outfits feel deliberately styled.

product_truth.claim: The pants are made from cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems.
product_truth.public_language: The pants are made from cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems.
product_truth.evidence: Standing exact-parity authorization plus the fresh official product page and supplied official product image
product_truth.faq_question: What do the pants look like?
product_truth.reference_claim: The pants are made from cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems.

product_truth.claim: The pants are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit with an adjustable elastic waist.
product_truth.public_language: The pants are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit with an adjustable elastic waist.
product_truth.evidence: Standing exact-parity authorization plus the fresh official product page
product_truth.reference_claim: The pants are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit with an adjustable elastic waist.

product_truth.claim: The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44.
product_truth.public_language: The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44.
product_truth.evidence: Standing exact-parity authorization plus the fresh official size guide
product_truth.reference_claim: The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44.

product_truth.claim: The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.
product_truth.public_language: The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.
product_truth.evidence: Standing exact-parity authorization plus the fresh official size guide
product_truth.reference_claim: The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.

product_truth.claim: The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces that may snag it.
product_truth.public_language: The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces that may snag it.

positioning.primary_buyer: a style-forward woman buying the pants for herself
positioning.primary_moment: getting dressed for a casual social plan when she wants one memorable piece to carry a simple outfit
positioning.new_opportunity: make the statement piece the trousers so their multicoloured tweed, relaxed silhouette, drawcord, and fringed hems do the visual work
positioning.desired_result: feel deliberately styled and distinctive without adding more competing pieces
positioning.specific_vehicle: the Sprinkle Tweed Pants' multicoloured cream tweed, relaxed baggy fit, adjustable elastic waist, braided drawcord, and fringed hems
positioning.customer_belief: When one piece carries the colour, texture, and silhouette, a simple outfit can feel more individual and intentional.
positioning.problem_statement: Easy outfits often disappear into the background, while piling on more pieces can make them feel busy instead of personal.
positioning.offer_connection: Auralo is the paid getting-ready finishing touch; the Sprinkle Tweed Pants are the FREE statement piece that shapes the outfit.
positioning.paid_role: Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume is the paid product used as a getting-ready finishing touch.
positioning.companion_role: The Sprinkle Tweed Pants are the FREE exact-parity statement trousers with the multicoloured tweed design and relaxed adjustable fit.
secondary_moments: weekend city outings styled with a simple fitted top or sweater
casual evenings and creative social settings where texture and colour can lead the look

secrets.title: Let the trousers carry the outfit
secrets.explanation: The cream tweed, multicoloured flecks, braided drawcord, and fringed hems provide the colour and texture, so the rest of the outfit can stay simple.

secrets.title: Choose the baggy shape on purpose
secrets.explanation: The relaxed baggy fit and adjustable elastic waist make the silhouette a deliberate part of the look.

secrets.title: Know the size and care before first wear
secrets.explanation: Use the EU size ranges and 110 cm standard length to choose, then protect the delicate tweed with dry-clean-only care.

public_language_guardrails: Do not mention the reference seller or competitor.
Do not compare prices or use compare-at pricing.
Do not claim comfort, stretch, warmth, durability, pockets, lining, or machine washability.
Do not turn framework names, research labels, or production instructions into public copy.
positioning.hero_headline: When You Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume Today, You Get Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE.
positioning.hero_subheadline: A cream multicoloured-tweed statement pair with a relaxed baggy fit, adjustable elastic waist, braided drawcord, and fringed hems.
positioning.story_intro: If your easiest outfits keep feeling forgettable, the answer may not be more layers or more accessories. It may be one pair of trousers designed to carry the colour, texture, and silhouette.
setup_steps: Choose XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, or L-XL for EU 42-44.
Use the adjustable elastic waist to set the relaxed baggy fit.
Dry clean only and keep the delicate tweed away from rough surfaces that may snag it.

free_product_reference.variant_basis: The supplied product image is the women's trouser, every supplied sizing comment discusses XS-S or M and a 26-inch waist, and the official page lists the women's range as XS-S, M, and L-XL.

research_basis: fresh public customer language about fun tweed and baggy statement trousers

campaign.research_topic: Fresh buyer language, purchase signals, objections, styling moments, and outfit frustrations around women's statement trousers, multicoloured tweed pants, relaxed baggy pants, and distinctive casual outfits. Exclude competitor pricing and seller promotions.

creative_direction.visual_style: Premium direct-response editorial photography with believable phone-camera texture and accurate product proportions.
creative_direction.buyer_world: Everyday environments in the target market that match the campaign's locked use moments.
creative_direction.cast_rule: Use 24 visibly distinct adults who fit the primary buyer; vary apparent age, skin tone, facial features, hair, wardrobe, camera, and lighting.

preview.footer_disclosure: This client preview contains illustrative claims and sample customer stories.

avatar.label: The style-forward self-purchaser who wants one memorable piece
avatar.purchase_moment: Getting dressed for a casual social plan when she wants one memorable piece to carry a simple outfit

pains.text: Easy outfits can feel forgettable, while adding more pieces can make them feel busy.
Trouser sizing and length can stop a confident purchase decision.

desires.text: She wants trousers distinctive enough to lead the whole look.
She wants to see the offer and know immediately how to get the pair.

objections.text: She needs the size range, length, and care requirements before deciding.

language_cues.text: Please send me a link to buy a pair.
How do I buy a pair.

big_domino.customer_belief: When one piece carries the colour, texture, and silhouette, a simple outfit can feel more individual and intentional.

copy.announcement: Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE.
copy.eyebrow: One finishing touch. One unforgettable statement piece.
copy.headline: When You Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume Today, You Get the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE.
copy.subheadline: Let cream tweed, multicoloured flecks, a braided drawcord, and fringed hems carry the outfit while everything else stays simple.
copy.story_heading: The trousers that do the visual work
copy.story_intro: Start with a simple top. Let the colour, texture, and relaxed silhouette become the point of the outfit.

story.heading: When simple starts to feel forgettable
story.body: You know the moment: a casual plan is coming up, your reliable basics are ready, but the outfit still needs one detail that feels unmistakably yours.

story.heading: Make one piece the whole point
story.body: When one piece carries the colour, texture, and silhouette, you can keep the rest of your outfit clean and still look deliberately styled.

story.heading: Colour and texture, already built in
story.body: The pants are made from cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems. Pair them with a fitted tee, knit, or sweater and let those details lead.

story.heading: A closer look at the statement
story.body: Cream tweed gives the pair its soft base. Multicoloured flecks add the visual spark, while the braided drawcord and fringed hems finish the design.

story.heading: Built for the plan already in your calendar
story.body: Wear them when a coffee turns into a long city walk, when a casual evening deserves more personality, or when you want your trousers to carry an otherwise simple look.

story.heading: The silhouette is part of the design
story.body: The pants are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit with an adjustable elastic waist. The shape is intentional, and the waist lets you adjust how the pair sits.

story.heading: More style without more competing pieces
story.body: You do not need to stack prints, layers, and accessories. Choose a simple top, add your usual shoes, and let the trousers be the memorable part.

story.heading: Choose with the measurements in front of you
story.body: The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44. The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.

story.heading: Treat the tweed like the statement fabric it is
story.body: The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces that may snag it. Know the care before first wear and keep the textured finish looking considered.

story.heading: Two parts of one getting-ready moment
story.body: Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume is the paid finishing touch. The Sprinkle Tweed Pants are the FREE statement piece that shapes the outfit.

story.heading: The complete offer, clearly stated
story.body: Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume today and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE. Ships within 4 days, with 90-day returns and a five-year warranty.

story.heading: One pair, three easy moments
story.body: Lead with them for a casual social plan, style them with a fitted top or sweater for a weekend city outing, or use their texture and colour for a creative evening look.

story.heading: Three steps before you head out
story.body: Choose XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, or L-XL for EU 42-44. Adjust the elastic waist for the relaxed baggy fit. Dry clean only and avoid rough surfaces that may snag the tweed.

story.heading: Finish the look with the complete offer
story.body: Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume and claim the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE in the same offer.

copy.offer_heading: Get the finishing touch. Receive the statement piece FREE.
copy.offer_body: Your offer includes Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume as the paid product and the Sprinkle Tweed Pants as the FREE companion. The design-led trousers bring the colour, texture, and relaxed shape to your outfit.
copy.final_body: Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume today and receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE.
copy.faq_heading: Your pants and offer questions, answered

proof_sections.social_heading: Start simple and let the trousers lead
proof_sections.recognition_heading: For days when basics need one memorable piece
proof_sections.recognition_body: See how a statement trouser can shape casual plans, city outings, and creative evenings without crowding the rest of the look.
proof_sections.compliments_heading: Cream tweed, colour flecks, drawcord, and fringe

proof_sections.wall_heading: See the statement piece through different eyes
proof_sections.wall_body: Different people, settings, and styling moments show how one distinctive pair can become the centre of a simple outfit.

sample_stories.context: getting dressed for a casual social plan when she wants one memorable piece to carry a simple outfit
sample_stories.outcome: A design choice supported by a practical fit detail
sample_stories.cast_description: Distinct woman, late 50s, pale olive skin, square face, silver blunt bob
sample_stories.setting: getting dressed for a casual social plan when she wants one memorable piece to carry a simple outfit

sample_stories.name: Ines U.
sample_stories.headline: Three steps and the outfit is set
sample_stories.review_text: I would choose my EU size, adjust the waist, and pair the trousers with a cream knit. The care instructions are clear for afterwards.

sample_stories.name: Ruby Y.
sample_stories.headline: This is the piece I would choose
sample_stories.review_text: For a casual evening, I want the cream tweed and colour flecks to lead. I would take the complete offer and keep the styling simple.
sample_stories.context: casual evenings and creative social settings where texture and colour can lead the look
sample_stories.outcome: A decisive close based on the design

claim_ledger.claim: Sprinkle Tweed Pants costs $0 in this offer.
The pants are made from cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems.
The pants are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit with an adjustable elastic waist.
The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44.
The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.
The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces that may snag it.

footer_disclosure: This client preview contains illustrative claims and sample customer stories.
